meaning: vt.表示,意味vi.要紧,有重要性v.颇为重要,表示
examples: He nodded to signify that he agreed.
Eating is a metaphor that is sometimes used to signify marriage.
Getting into Yale may signify intelligence, talent and ambition.
Two ears signify an even better result, while the tail represents the peak of recognition.
Common and often inconsequential in early pregnancy, later on it can signify serious problems.
